description: Example configuration for the nightly Copilot Dream consolidation for a fictional service 'acme-api'. Copy this to ~/.copilot/dream/config.json and edit identity/paths/thresholds. harvest.py, ledger.py, run-dream.ps1 and the consolidation prompt all read this file.

model_policy.note: Replace with Copilot models you have access to. Prefer a large context window and high reasoning effort. run-dream.ps1 enforces this allow-list.

window.note: Harvest window = now - min(hours since last successful run, max_hours), floored at default_hours on first run.

domain.off_domain_note: Off-domain personal projects and machine-maintenance chatter are DROPPED from the reference skills. Keep something only if it reveals a durable, reusable dev-workflow lesson.

agent_memory.note: Repo-specific coding patterns go to per-repo .github/agent-history/*.md via the repo-memory protocol, NOT to personal skills.

thresholds.note: SHORT items seen >= promote_hit_count over >= promote_distinct_days distinct days become promotion candidates. Active SHORT items untouched for decay_days are archived. Only HIGH-confidence LONG items auto-apply; others go to review-queue. Items with importance < importance_keep_floor are dropped unless part of an active thread.
